snapshot: Acme Health System is a regional integrated delivery network operating 12 hospitals and ~140 ambulatory sites across the Midwest. Roughly 28,000 employees and ~$6.2B in annual revenue. Mission centers on community health and clinical excellence.
priority_summary: Acme is investing in clinician burnout reduction, ambient documentation, and revenue cycle automation. EHR-anchored on Epic with growing emphasis on data platform consolidation. Likely high-priority account for any vendor selling clinician-facing AI, analytics, or cybersecurity.

recent_signals.text: Announced 3-year digital and AI strategy with focus on ambient clinical documentation.
Selected new CISO from a top academic medical center.
Job postings for ML engineers and data platform leads on the careers site.

ai_tech_maturity.rationale: Multiple active programs (ambient AI, revenue cycle automation, data platform), public strategy, named executive sponsorship, but limited evidence of production-scale governance.

top_initiatives.title: Ambient clinical documentation
top_initiatives.detail: System-wide rollout to reduce clinician documentation burden; pilots underway in primary care.

top_initiatives.title: Revenue cycle automation
top_initiatives.detail: RPA and ML-assisted prior authorization to recover margin.

top_initiatives.title: Cybersecurity modernization
top_initiatives.detail: New CISO mandate; identity and segmentation investments.

top_initiatives.title: Data platform consolidation
top_initiatives.detail: Stated goal to unify analytics on a cloud lakehouse.

personas.name: Dr. Jane Smith
personas.title: Chief Medical Information Officer
personas.priority: Reduce documentation burden, improve clinician satisfaction
personas.opener: Open with ambient AI rollout learnings from peer IDNs.

personas.title: Chief Information Officer
personas.opener: Discuss reference architectures from similar IDNs.

personas.name: Mark Patel
personas.title: Chief Information Security Officer
personas.opener: Reference recent ransomware trends in healthcare.

buying_path: Centralized IT and security purchasing through CIO and CISO, with clinical co-sponsorship from CMIO. Procurement office handles RFPs above $500K. Major platform decisions involve board-level technology committee.
first_angle: Lead with clinician burnout and ambient AI ROI. Bring 1–2 IDN reference customers with similar EHR footprint. Pair with a security conversation given the new CISO and recent regional ransomware activity.
risks: Heavy Epic-anchored ecosystem may limit point-solution appetite.
Margin pressure could slow net-new commitments without clear ROI.
Active CISO transition may delay security purchases by 1–2 quarters.
competitive_signals: Public mention of cloud lakehouse evaluation — likely Databricks vs. Snowflake.
next_action: Request a 30-minute meeting with the CMIO via warm intro from the regional advisory board. Prepare a 1-page point of view on ambient AI rollout for IDNs.

sources.title: Acme press release — Digital & AI Strategy
